client.name: Ayax Bader

team.name: Kubi (medicenkuki)
team.role: Team member, to be included on all comms

team.name: Jamil
team.role: Key collaborator, source of guest suggestions. Currently in Canada.

notable_background: Audiovisual industry background (editing, post-production, After Effects)
Runs a branding agency (branding workshops, storytelling frameworks)
Previously ran a podcast (understands the medium)

company.name: Bellman Media
company.positioning: Branding agency and video production company. Part of the Ahoy ecosystem which builds software tools for developers to lower the barrier of entry to high tech globally.

ahoy_context.what_ahoy_does: Creates software tools for developers to lower the barrier of entry to high tech, promoting geography-agnostic Deep Tech development
ahoy_context.media_ecosystem: Building a media ecosystem around Ahoy: news publication + events IP + podcast (this project)

format.recording_location: Bellman office, Dubai (conference room being converted to studio)

editorial_philosophy.core_principle: Nobody cares about you. The audience is the hero. Every conversation must deliver actionable value the viewer can apply today.
editorial_philosophy.what_they_want: Actionable takeaways from founders building with purpose. What can I learn from your story that I can apply to my business today?
editorial_philosophy.what_they_dont_want: Ego-driven storytelling, generic founder origin stories, 'tell me about your journey' format
editorial_philosophy.content_strategy: Episodes structured for short-form extraction. Ayax will prepare questions specifically designed to trigger strong standalone clips.
editorial_philosophy.guest_prep_note: Guests will be briefed: don't talk about yourself, focus on what the audience can learn. 'We are not the heroes in our story.'

guest_criteria.focus: Founders and startups building something with purpose/impact beyond just making money
guest_criteria.geographic_focus: Middle East / UAE region primarily, but open
ideal_examples: Startup creating water from air for remote villages (Ahoy partner)
Impact-driven tech founders in the region
not_looking_for: Generic SaaS/marketing automation founders with no impact angle
Pure 'we raised money' stories without substance
guest_criteria.note: Jamil (key collaborator) expected to suggest many guests once briefed

success_criteria_any_one_of: A valuable partnership for Ahoy (credibility to justify continued funding)
Branding work for Bellman (leverage podcast conversations into branding workshop sales)
Sponsorship that covers production costs (self-sustaining model)
broader_objectives: Build media ecosystem around Ahoy (podcast + news publication + events)
Promote impactful projects and founders in the region
Increase brand equity of Bellman Media
Boost Ahoy Ventures by highlighting portfolio founders
Promote entrepreneurship and Deep Tech development in the Middle East
goals.content_philosophy: Consistency and iteration over virality. Measure the input (episodes published, posting frequency) and iterate based on what works.

nalu_handles: Full editing: long-form + short-form clip selection and editing
YouTube management (uploading, thumbnails, A/B testing with 6 variations)
Copywriting: carousels, newsletter, social media posts
Notion workspace setup (foundational docs, content calendar)
Recording support: on-site operator to monitor equipment

bellman_has: Panasonic GH5S (3rd camera option, but color matching issues with Sony)
gaps: 3rd matching Sony camera (Nalu to potentially supply)
equipment.action: Ayax to send Excel equipment list + photos for Nalu to assess

kpis.note: AWAITING ONBOARDING FORM. Ayax explicitly said he is not focused on views/likes/shares initially. Consistency is the primary measurable input.

logistics.first_recordings_target: Week of March 24+, aim for 2-3 episodes to build buffer before launch
